Return on Investment
Your money simplified, so you may simply live.
Read More
This is Life and Wealth,
Well Managed.
Since our founding in 1990, the focus of Truepoint Wealth Counsel has been creating the best personal financial advisory experience possible. We are fee-only fiduciaries and remain 100% employee-owned. We employ an evidence-based investment strategy. Tax planning and preparation and estate planning strategy are a core element of our client experience and have been for years. And all our guidance is rooted in your personal values and goals. Let us connect all the dots in your financial life to deliver peace of mind and possibility.
The Latest
We’re Hiring
Join our team of relationship-driven financial advisors.
Open Positions
Experience the Truepoint Difference
Looking for an advisory team that can help you build your future and bring all the pieces together?
Who We Serve
Despite how our industry typically operates, there simply is not a one-size-fits-all solution when it comes to personal finance. We focus on your needs first, then craft a values-based life plan to achieve those goals. Explore some of the most common needs we serve daily below.
Business Owners
Successfully managing your business (and financial life) requires organization, coordination, knowledge, and time. As business owners ourselves, we understand that it takes planning and perseverance to succeed.
Learn more
Learn more
Families
Wealth management for families is more than managing portfolios. Whether you need specific trust or estate assistance or prefer a full suite of services, we will provide guidance that is rooted in your personal values and goals.
Learn more
Learn more
Corporate Executives
Everybody has questions about retirement planning – especially those who have built successful careers, either at one company or over the course of many job opportunities. Developing the right plan to meet your ideal vision of retirement is the key.
Learn more
Learn more
Institutional Investing
We are committed to advising smaller and mid-sized institutional investors that traditionally are underserved by other financial firms. These are organizations that can truly benefit from a steady, long-term approach to investing.
Learn more
Learn more
P&G Employees
For P&G employees and alumni, choosing a wealth management firm is one of the biggest financial decisions you will make. And likely you want a team who can deliver value by connecting the dots of your financial life, beyond just the PST and SP.
Learn more
Learn more
Women’s Wealth Counsel
We like to think of women as more than just a niche audience. Welcome to our Women’s Wealth Counsel, a community of our female clients, team members and professional partners!
Learn more
Learn more
Commas
Founded on the same fiduciary principles as Truepoint, our Commas team helps you money confidently at a pace at which you choose with a no account minimum subscription structure.
Learn more
Learn more
We’d love to chat with you to see if we’re the right fit for you.
Schedule a Call
Schedule a Call
A Team Dedicated to Your Financial Life Plan.
